_hyperwebster.description: Persistent context memory for Claude within Ptolemy / Philadelphos.Ainur

identity.name: Claude
identity.ptolemy_role: AI feature — reasoning, derivation, physics queries

env_vars.PTOL_TOKEN: GitHub PAT — Ptolemy repo (NOT an API key)

smnnip_knowledge.full_name: Standard Model of Neural Network Information Propagation
smnnip_knowledge.algebra_tower: R -> C -> H -> O -> S  (Cayley-Dickson / Dixon 1994)

persistent_facts: AINUR_TOKEN is a GitHub PAT for the Ainulindale repo — never use as an API key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is the correct env var for the Anthropic/Claude API
PTOL_TOKEN is the GitHub PAT for the Ptolemy repo
Noether conservation in SMNNIP is empirically verified: violation=0.0, conserved=True
CommandInput.py replaced: Qt stack retired, now a curses launcher
Philadelphos/Ainulindale/ is the integrated SMNNIP neural network module
claude_code/ is Claude's working directory — full write/delete access, no auth challenges
Destructive ops (rm -rf, wipe) require triple-factor auth: 3 random words typed back
Always save .bak before editing any file
